channel.title: Chase Coleman — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED META (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added META in Q4 2025 · 13.4% of portfolio. Adding to top position. Tiger Global conviction.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED SE (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added SE in Q4 2025 · 5.8% of portfolio. Building Sea Limited — Southeast Asia.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED NVDA (-10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed NVDA in Q4 2025 · 7.1% of portfolio. Taking some NVDA profits.

item.title: Chase Coleman: NEW POSITION SPOT · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) new position SPOT in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio. New Spotify position.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED MSFT (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed MSFT (MICROSOFT CORP) in Q4 2025 · 8.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED AMZN (-9%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED TSM (-19%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed TSM (TAIWAN SEMICONDUCTOR MFG LTD) in Q4 2025 · 3.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED APP (-35%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed APP (APPLOVIN CORP) in Q4 2025 · 2.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED GEV (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed GEV (GE VERNOVA INC) in Q4 2025 · 2.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED BLOCK (+44%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added BLOCK (BLOCK INC) in Q4 2025 · 1.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED ZS (-6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed ZS (ZSCALER INC) in Q4 2025 · 1.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED NOW (+609%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added NOW (SERVICENOW INC) in Q4 2025 · 1.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED NFLX (+1108%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added NFLX (NETFLIX INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED SHW (-22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed SHW (SHERWIN WILLIAMS CO) in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: EXITED MNST (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) exited MNST (MONGODB INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED META (+45%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added META in Q3 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Major META build — the biggest Tiger Global move.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED MSFT (+30%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added MSFT in Q3 2025 · 9.8% of portfolio. Adding Microsoft.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED NVDA (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added NVDA in Q3 2025 · 7.9% of portfolio. Pre-trim NVDA build.
